title: Close Encounters applies Atk SPD and AL plus four while equipped

card.rawText: Atk: +4. SPD: +4. AL: +4. If this card is destroyed, return it to your deck after 3 turn cycles. Shuffle.

plan.title: Close Encounters applies Atk SPD and AL plus four while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Close Encounters to a modifier-zero primary creature and verify the printed Atk, SPD, and AL bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Close Encounters.

steps: Player 1 plays Close Encounters and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective AL and SPD.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +4 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm the separate destroyed-card delayed return and shuffle effects resolve after 3 turn cycles.
riskNotes: This fixture covers only the stat modifier effect; delayed return/shuffle are effects 131-E01 and 131-E02.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Close Encounters equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
